message:
fix(connector): integrity hash coverage + push_bounded sequence invariant

policy_checkpoint: push_bounded on checkpoints evicts oldest entries,
breaking verify_chain()'s cp.sequence == index invariant. Replace with
capacity check that rejects at MAX_CHECKPOINTS.

incident_bundle_retention: integrity hash omitted component_ids and tags
metadata fields, allowing silent tampering without hash invalidation.
Add length-prefixed hash entries for both Vec<String> fields.

Closes: bd-1kkj, bd-2jz3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
